$comment: Effects available to the design loop. Adding an effect is a data edit here plus a folder — the skill reads this file and needs no changes.

effects.name: Marble Ink (Japanese)
effects.summary: Animated mesh gradient — domain-warped fBm noise with a cursor-driven force field. Reads as ink floated on water.
gateRisks: contrast: text over the gradient can drop below 4.5:1 on bright frames — a scrim is mandatory, not optional
overflow: canvas must be position:fixed/absolute inset-0, never a sized block in flow
pointer-events: canvas must be pointer-events:none or it eats every click beneath it

console: over file:// the origin is null and ES-module imports are CORS-blocked — prototypes MUST use the `global` build, not `entry`. Verified: <script type=module> fails the gate, <script src> passes.
effects.cost: one fullscreen triangle, 5-octave fBm x3 per pixel; dprCap 1.5 and autoPause on by default
